influencer.name: Nova Linh
influencer.persona: 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino AI model. Loves travel, cutesy aesthetics, and effortless style.

posts.title: Golden Hour in Bali Rice Terraces
posts.prompt: Cinematic portrait of a 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman standing in Bali Tegallalang rice terraces at golden hour. She wears a flowing white linen sundress with thin spaghetti straps. Warm, hazy backlight creates a golden rim around her silhouette. She looks over her shoulder with a soft, candid smile. Shot on 85mm f/1.4, shallow depth of field, warm film grain, editorial travel photography style. Ultra-realistic, 8K detail.
posts.trending_reference: Bali rice terrace content spiked 340% on X this week. Golden-hour silhouette shots get 4–6x more engagement than mid-day shots.

posts.title: Neon Night Street in Tokyo
posts.prompt: Short cinematic video clip: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman slowly walks through a narrow Tokyo alley at night. Vibrant neon signs in red, pink, and blue reflect off rain-wet cobblestones. She wears a cropped bomber jacket, black mini skirt, and platform boots. Camera follows her from slightly behind, then she turns and glances back with a playful smirk. Slow motion with light rain particles. Cinematic 24fps, anamorphic lens flare, cyberpunk-adjacent but grounded in reality.
posts.trending_reference: Tokyo night walk videos consistently hit 500K+ plays on Threads. The wet street neon reflection aesthetic is one of the most viral visual hooks of 2026.

posts.title: Dreamy Santorini Rooftop
posts.prompt: Dreamy editorial photo of a 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman sitting on a whitewashed Santorini rooftop, legs dangling off the edge. She wears a strappy coral-pink bikini top and wide-leg linen pants. She holds a glass of white wine and laughs genuinely at something off-camera. Bright midday Mediterranean light. The Aegean Sea is vivid blue in the background with white cubic houses. Shot on analog film, slight overexposure, fashion magazine quality. Ultra-realistic.
posts.trending_reference: Greece travel content peaks every spring on X. Candid expressions (genuine laugh, looking off-camera) outperform posed shots by 2.3x in engagement.

posts.title: Cherry Blossom Walk in Kyoto
posts.prompt: Slow cinematic video: A beautiful 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman in a soft pink floral sundress walks through a Kyoto cherry blossom tunnel at Maruyama Park. Petals fall gently around her. She reaches up and catches a petal, smiling softly. Camera does a slow push-in from mid-shot to close-up on her face. Soft natural light, slight bokeh on falling petals. Spring pastel color grade, dreamy and feminine. 4K, cinematic motion.
posts.trending_reference: Cherry blossom content generates massive engagement every March–April. The 'catching a falling petal' micro-moment is one of the most-saved video moments in travel content.

posts.title: Morning Coffee in a Paris Café
posts.prompt: Soft morning light portrait: A 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman sits at a small bistro table inside a classic Parisian café. She holds a white ceramic café au lait with both hands, eyes slightly downcast, lost in thought. She wears an oversized cream knit sweater, minimal gold jewelry, and soft natural makeup. Warm morning sun streams through lace curtains. Film grain, muted warm tones, moody editorial. Shot on Leica 50mm. Ultra-realistic lifestyle photography.
posts.trending_reference: The 'quiet girl morning' aesthetic consistently performs on X and Threads. Paris café content pairs well with trending 'soft life' and 'that girl' aesthetics dominating lifestyle niches.

posts.title: Beach Day in Palawan
posts.prompt: Casual beach video: A beautiful 24-year-old Vietnamese-Filipino woman walks along a pristine white-sand beach in Palawan, Philippines at golden hour. She wears a small triangle bikini in terracotta orange and carries her sandals in one hand. Ocean waves gently lap at her feet. Camera follows her from a low angle, capturing the reflection of her legs in the wet sand. She glances back at the camera with a natural, confident smile. Warm golden light. Travel vlog aesthetic. 4K slow motion.
posts.trending_reference: Philippine beach content drives strong national pride engagement. Filipino audiences on X share and comment heavily. Palawan and Siargao are consistently top-performing locations.
